mapper.sql: id, supplier_id, settlement_month, total_income, withdrawable_amount, frozen_amount, order_amount, delivery_fee, installation_fee, refund_deduction, aftersale_deduction, status, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_wallet_settlements (supplier_id, settlement_month, total_income, withdrawable_amount, frozen_amount, order_amount, delivery_fee, installation_fee, refund_deduction, aftersale_deduction, status, created_at) VALUES (#{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{settlementMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalIncome, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{withdrawableAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{frozenAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{orderAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deliveryFee, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{installationFee, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{refundDeduction, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{aftersaleDeduction, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO supplier_wallet_settlements (supplier_id, settlement_month, total_income, withdrawable_amount, frozen_amount, order_amount, delivery_fee, installation_fee, refund_deduction, aftersale_deduction, status, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.settlementMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.totalIncome, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.withdrawableAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.frozenAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.orderAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.deliveryFee, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.installationFee, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.refundDeduction, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.aftersaleDeduction, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM supplier_wallet_settlements WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
SELECT FROM supplier_wallet_settlements WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier_wallet_settlements SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE supplier_wallet_settlements SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
